emphasized text

strong text

literal text

A link

This is an extremely awesome sentence. Another mega-awesome sentence. Lines that are together form a paragraph.

Lines that are apart form separate paragraphs.

This is a code block:

$conda install matplotlib=2.0.2

Some headings:

Level 1¶

Level 2¶

Level 3¶

Level 4¶

Here is a bullet list:

  • list item 1
  • second list item
    • a nested list item
    • another nest list item

Here is a table:

Residue 1 Residue 2 Residue 3
1 2 3
3 1 3

Here is some comment:

Here is a citation reference: [RO2014].

[RO2014]A.A.A.T. Ribeiro and V.Ortiz (2014) - Determination of contact topology in protein energy networks etc.

gRINN
